DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL PLTF'S ATTENDANCE AND TESTIMONY AT DEPOSITION; REQUEST FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF DEPOSITION CANCELLLATION FEE; POS - AFTER HEARING, DEFENDANT SELLEN SHANAHAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S ATTENDANCE AND TESTIMONY AT DEPOSITON AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AS THE PARTIES SHALL AGREE UPON A DATE AND THE DEPOSITION SHALL BE CONDUCTED WITHOUT RESTRICTIONS AS SOUGHT BY DEFENDANT. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Attendance And Testimony At Deposition; Request For Reimbursement Of Deposition Cancelllation Fee; Pos
Off Calendar Aug-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ariella Evelyn Perry, Atty. for defendant and moving party: Ellen Shanahan
Janet Haas, Plaintiff In Proper

RULING: After hearing, Defendant Sellen Shanahan's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Attendance And Testimony At Depositon And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED as the parties shall agree upon a date and the deposition shall be conducted without restrictions as sought by defendant. Request for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
